hooks.command: cd "D:/Projects/football-data-crawler" && bash -c 'STAGED=$(git diff --cached --name-only) && if [ -n "$STAGED" ]; then echo "[auto-sync] 检测到未提交更改,正在自动提交..."; OVER1M=""; for f in $STAGED; do sz=$(stat -c%s "$f" 2>/dev/null); if [ "$sz" -gt 1048576 ]; then OVER1M="$OVER1M $f($sz)"; fi; done; if [ -n "$OVER1M" ]; then echo "[auto-sync] 警告: 大文件(>1MB)未提交: $OVER1M"; else git add -A && git commit -m "auto: session checkpoint $(date +%Y%m%d-%H%M%S)" && git push && echo "[auto-sync] 已自动提交并推送"; fi; else echo "[auto-sync] 工作区干净,无需提交"; fi'
